title: Audit current WordPress site IA and page hierarchy
description: Document every page, URL, and redirect needed before Webflow build begins. Lucia to compile with Jonas.

title: Define Webflow CMS collections: Staff Picks, Events, Authors
description: Set up the three core CMS collections in Webflow. Each item in Staff Picks needs title, author, language, and Lucia's note field.

title: Design homepage hero section - dark-linen bookshop aesthetic
description: Hero section should echo the shop's physical feel: dark wood shelves, linen textures. Lucia wants it to feel literary, not e-commerce.

title: Build navigation and header with language-filter strip
description: Top nav with Shop, Events, About, Lending Shelf. Language filter (All / English / Swedish / German / French) should persist across the catalogue.

title: Build Events page - upcoming and archive views
description: Events CMS collection needs upcoming (sorted by date) and archive (sorted desc) views. Each event links to a detail page with booking info.

title: Build Staff Picks page with Lucia's note per title
description: Lucia writes a 2-3 sentence note per title. Jonas builds the CMS-driven page with cover image, author, and note. Swedish and English picks should be visually distinct.

title: Integrate Stripe checkout for online book orders and gift cards
description: Stripe Payment Links or custom checkout. Products: individual books (Webflow Ecommerce disabled in favour of Stripe), gift cards in 200 / 500 / 1000 kr denominations. Tax rate 6% Swedish VAT on books.

title: Stripe webhook handler for order confirmation emails
description: On payment_intent.succeeded fire a transactional email via SendGrid (orders@weaverandbook.se). Include order summary, pick-up or shipping note.

title: Mobile responsiveness audit - all pages below 480px
description: Test every page at 375px (iPhone SE) and 430px (iPhone 15). Navigation hamburger, hero text, event cards, and checkout all need checking.

title: Fix hamburger menu overlap on Events page at 375px
description: Hamburger icon overlaps the 15th Anniversary banner at 375px. Z-index conflict between the sticky header and the hero banner.

title: Populate Staff Picks CMS - 15 titles with Lucia's notes
description: Lucia to draft notes in Notion; Jonas imports into Webflow CMS. First batch: 5 Swedish, 5 English, 3 German, 2 French titles.

title: Write and populate About page - shop history and opening hours
description: About page: shop story since 2011, opening hours (Tue-Sat 10-18, event nights to 20:00), address, map embed. Lucia writes; Jonas publishes.

title: SEO meta titles and descriptions for all CMS-driven pages
description: Jonas to add meta title and description fields to all CMS collection pages. Lucia to write copy for Staff Picks and Events. Target Swedish and English search terms.

title: Lending Shelf page - description and request form
description: Static page explaining the lending shelf for regulars. Embed Typeform for new member requests. Lucia to write the copy.

title: Checkout: gift card amount not updating on mobile Safari
description: On iPhone 15 Safari the gift card denomination selector (200 / 500 / 1000 kr) resets to 200 kr on every tap. Stripe Payment Link sees the wrong amount.

title: Confirm Cloudflare DNS records for weaverandbook.se cutover
description: Verify A record, CNAME for www, MX for email forwarding (no-reply@weaverandbook.se), and TXT for SPF/DKIM before pointing DNS to Webflow.

title: Redirect map: old WordPress URLs to new Webflow slugs
description: Map /events/<old-slug> to /evenemang/<new-slug> and all /shop/ paths. Implement 301s in Cloudflare Page Rules to avoid SEO drop.

title: CMS: add 15th-anniversary event page and ticket link
description: Create a dedicated CMS event entry for the October 17 anniversary celebration. Include author panel info, RSVP / Eventbrite link, and local press note for Tobias Renström.

title: Staging review sign-off before go-live
description: Lucia to walk through the full site on webflow.io staging: all pages, checkout flow, mobile, email confirmations. Logged here for traceability.

title: Footer: newsletter signup form and social links
description: Footer should include Mailchimp signup embed, @weaverbook Instagram link, and shop address. Jonas to wire up; Lucia to test signup flow.

title: Backlog: accessibility WCAG AA pass on CMS pages
description: After content is populated run a full WCAG AA audit: colour contrast on linen background, alt text on all cover images, keyboard navigation through checkout.

title: Canceled: Webflow Ecommerce product catalogue (use Stripe Payment Links instead)
description: Initial plan was to use Webflow Ecommerce. Descoped in favour of Stripe Payment Links for simplicity. Webflow Ecommerce requires a higher plan tier.
